title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the National Dairy Development Board Act, 1987. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 12th October, 1987, vide notification No. S.O. 898(E), dated 12th October, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i).
